skill.name: explore
skill.tagline: Route every open question to its rightful source — world, human, or experiment.
skill.shortSummary: Settle discussion unknowns by classifying each as world-, human-, or nobody-owned and dispatching it to its oracle for an evidence-backed ruling.
skill.fullSummary: Explore keeps discussions honest by refusing to let unknowns pass as assumptions. Each open question is routed to exactly one oracle — research for world fact, interview for human preference, experiment for untried unknowns — so decisions land on evidence and explicit rulings. The conversation only proceeds once every blocking unknown is settled.

highlights.title: Three-Source Oracle Routing
highlights.description: Every unknown is classified as WORLD-, HUMAN-, or NOBODY-owned and settled by exactly one method: research, interview, or experiment. Misclassification is prevented by hard boundaries — never ask the world, never assume the human, never guess the experiment.

highlights.title: Parallel Grounded Research
highlights.description: WORLD-owned unknowns launch one background explorer per question, each armed with web search and a strict brief template requiring dated sources, conflict notes, and confidence. The main thread waits for all briefs, then reports once — never a partial drip.

highlights.title: Rationed Decision Interviews
highlights.description: HUMAN-owned unknowns are settled one decision-changing question at a time, each carrying a recommended answer and its reason. Related forks batch into a single call, keeping a session to roughly 4–6 questions and turning answers into explicit rulings.

highlights.title: Experiments for Untried Unknowns
highlights.description: When nobody yet knows the answer, Explore dispatches the attune experiment skill. Its outcome returns as evidence the user still rules on, carried forward like any other settled decision.

steps.name: Announce and Classify
steps.description: Announce the skill, then triage each open unknown by owner.
steps.details: State the explore skill is active, then sort every unknown into WORLD-, HUMAN-, or NOBODY-owned so each has exactly one settlement path.

steps.name: Spawn Parallel Research
steps.description: Launch one grounded explorer per WORLD-owned unknown.
steps.details: Send one message with multiple tool calls, each carrying the full response contract, MUST/MUST NOT lists, and the brief template requiring dated sources.

steps.name: Validate and Report Briefs
steps.description: Wait for all briefs, validate each, report once.
steps.details: Check source credibility and dates, resolve conflicts by authority and recency, then relay every brief verbatim in a single consolidated report.

steps.name: Interview the Human
steps.description: Ask decision-changing HUMAN-owned questions one at a time.
steps.details: Pick the most decision-changing unknown, ask with a recommended answer and reason, state the ruling explicitly, and batch up to 4 independent forks per call.

steps.name: Dispatch Experiments
steps.description: Send NOBODY-owned unknowns to the experiment skill.
steps.details: Hand off to attune experiment, accept its outcome as evidence, let the user rule on it, and carry the ruling into the active task artifact.
